channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16849] sanity test_133a: The counter for mkdir on mds1 was not incremented
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Minh Diep <mdiep@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/093c76fe-b8a9-4c2f-8d5c-a1251e8351bf

test_133a failed with the following error:

The counter for mkdir on mds1 was not incremented

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/62 - 4.18.0-372.32.1.el8_6.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/62 - 4.18.0-372.32.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

== sanity test 133a: Verifying MDT stats ================================================================================================== 11:17:29 (1684581449)
CMD: trevis-61vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl list_param mdt.*.rename_stats
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.rename_stats
mdt.lustre-MDT0002.rename_stats
CMD: trevis-61vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.md_stats=clear
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.md_stats=clear
mdt.lustre-MDT0002.md_stats=clear
CMD: trevis-61vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param obdfilter.*.stats=clear
obdfilter.lustre-OST0000.stats=clear
obdfilter.lustre-OST0001.stats=clear
obdfilter.lustre-OST0002.stats=clear
obdfilter.lustre-OST0003.stats=clear
obdfilter.lustre-OST0004.stats=clear
obdfilter.lustre-OST0005.stats=clear
obdfilter.lustre-OST0006.stats=clear
obdfilter.lustre-OST0007.stats=clear
CMD: trevis-61vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.lustre-MDT0000.md_stats
sanity test_133a: @@@@@@ FAIL: The counter for mkdir on mds1 was not incremented
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6406:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:14088:check_stats()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:14114:test_133a()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6723:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6770:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6611:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:14143:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2023-05-20/lustre-b2_15_full-dne-part-2_62_8_26dc02a0-f34f-4fd3-a7a7-1f1faaf1b3f4//sanity.test_133a.*.1684581454.log
CMD: trevis-61vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-61vm2,trevis-61vm3,trevis-61vm4,trevis-61vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-05-20/lustre-b2_15_full-dne-part-2_62_8_26dc02a0-f34f-4fd3-a7a7-1f1faaf1b3f4//sanity.test_133a.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1684581454.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-05-20/lustre-b2_15_full-dne-part-2_62_8_26dc02a0-f34f-4fd3-a7a7-1f1faaf1b3f4//sanity.test_133a.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1684581454.log

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_133a - The counter for mkdir on mds1 was not incremented
item.summary: sanity test_133a: The counter for mkdir on mds1 was not incremented

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
